_comment: Production 08 §2.1 allocation patch template. Replace every TODO with the onboarding-approved real account and convert this manifest into the runtime genesis patch consumed by chain-spec-builder.

_runtime_default_accounts._comment: Protocol-derived ss58-7777 accounts for MAIN and the two pots; these are mandatory in every profile.

futarchy_treasury._comment: 09 §4 Coretime ops seats, patched into the runtime's futarchyTreasury genesis section. Both are outputs of the Phase-2/3 ops ceremony, so neither has a correct value in advance; both are unset-fails-closed in the runtime, which makes a genesis that simply forgets them look identical to one still awaiting the ceremony. They are therefore carried here as explicit unfilled seats, and seating them is a Phase-3 entry gate (12 §6.5). Development and test presets seat stand-ins and are exempt.
futarchy_treasury._encoding: coretime_quote_authority is an SS58 account (patch key coretimeQuoteAuthority); coretime_renewal_account is the Coretime-chain 32-byte account, serialised as a byte array in the genesis patch (patch key coretimeRenewalAccount).

usdc_genesis_endowments._assets_row_requirement: The patch MUST also declare foreignAssets.assets rows for USDC and DOT as [Location, owner, is_sufficient, min_balance] with owner = the derived ledger sovereign fvGJck7fS1t2ejm7TyRMiteKHuDAN2G8Fb4bUq4N7pC8vwE3u and is_sufficient = true. pallet-assets genesis installs the owner as issuer, admin AND freezer, so any other owner holds mint/burn/freeze authority over all protocol collateral; the chain-spec validator rejects both deviations.
usdc_genesis_endowments._comment: 03 §7 R-4: exactly min_balance (10000 base units = 0.01 USDC) per protocol-derived account makes each account non-reapable. The total 100000 base units = 0.10 USDC is deliberately unbacked genesis issuance, minimal by construction. amount_base_units values are decimal strings in this manifest and must be converted to JSON integers in foreignAssets.accounts in the runtime patch.

groups.name: community_distribution
groups._control: Held until Phase-4 arming; the 24-month distribution schedule is not a genesis vesting schedule.
